[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up anime-style illustration shows the side profile of a person with black hair and a focused expression, framed against a colorful background.

Main Subject:
A single person is shown from the chest up in a side profile facing to the right. The character has short-to-medium dark hair with sharp bangs, light skin, a blue eye visible, and a small nose and mouth with a closed-lip expression. The skin near the cheek shows small blush marks, and there are thin line details suggesting sweat or small droplets.

Setting:
The background is an out-of-focus outdoor-looking scene with a large grid-like pattern in green, blue, and red blocks, resembling a wall or fence. The lighting appears bright and even, suggesting daylight, though the exact time of day is unclear.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is very close and slightly upward, emphasizing the face and eye. The character wears a garment with bold black-and-white striping and a yellow vertical stripe along the shoulder or sleeve area. The hair has stylized shading with dark outlines and lighter highlights. The overall style is clean and flat with cel-shaded colors.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image is a close-up anime illustration of a person in side profile with black hair and a blue eye. The character wears black-and-white striped clothing with a yellow accent, set against a blurred, colorful grid-pattern background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
